title: limonium capitis-marci
intro: Limonium capitis-marci, also known as Sea Lavender or Statice, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Limonium capitis-marci include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
